title: Sous-vide Norwegian Earthy Plum Tomato Crumble
description: This whole30-friendly dish features baby plum tomatoes cooked sous-vide to perfection and topped with a dense crumble of almond flour and egg whites, making it ideal for hangover cures.

ingredients.name: Almond Flour
ingredients.notes: Grind in food processor if not already ground

ingredients.name: Honey or Molasses (optional)
ingredients.notes: For added sweetness and depth of flavor

instructions: Place the halved plum tomatoes in a sous-vide bag, add some honey or molasses for additional flavors if desired.
Cook at 98°C (208°F) for 1 hour. Remove from water bath.
In a mixing bowl, combine almond flour, egg whites, baking powder, and coconut oil. Mix well until smooth.
Evenly distribute the crumble mixture over the cooked tomatoes in the sous-vide bag.
Re-seal the bag, ensuring it's vacuum sealed for sealing efficiency.
Cook the bagged tomatoes under water bath at 71°C (160°F) for an additional hour to set the crumble and soften the tomatoes slightly.
Carefully open the sealed bag while keeping it in the cooking water bath. Remove the cooked tomatoes from the sous-vide bag, slice into smaller pieces if needed, and serve hot.
